name: 4D74_cyclist_fast
prompt:
First-person walking perspective at chest height approaching a path intersection. The intersection is clear until a cyclist appears from the right side path, moving at significant speed directly across the main path junction.

The cyclist crosses the intersection fast, leaning slightly into the curve, moving from right to left across the path. Their speed is substantial — they are crossing the junction without slowing. The crossing happens quickly and the path ahead is temporarily blocked.

The cyclist is at center frame crossing the intersection. Their speed is evident from their body lean and wheel blur. The path through the intersection is blocked by the fast-moving cyclist during the crossing.
negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
